CreateCampaign.description: Grants permission to create a campaign

DeleteCampaign.description: Grants permission to delete a campaign

DeleteCampaignChannelSubtypeConfig.description: Grants permission to delete the channel subtype configuration of a campaign

DeleteCampaignCommunicationLimits.description: Grants permission to delete the communication limits configuration of a campaign

DeleteCampaignCommunicationTime.description: Grants permission to delete the communication time configuration of a campaign

DeleteConnectInstanceConfig.description: Grants permission to remove configuration information for an Amazon Connect instance

DeleteConnectInstanceIntegration.description: Grants permission to remove integration information for an Amazon Connect instance

DeleteInstanceOnboardingJob.description: Grants permission to remove onboarding job for an Amazon Connect instance

DescribeCampaign.description: Grants permission to describe a specific campaign

GetCampaignState.description: Grants permission to get state of a campaign

GetCampaignStateBatch.description: Grants permission to get state of campaigns

GetConnectInstanceConfig.description: Grants permission to get configuration information for an Amazon Connect instance

GetInstanceCommunicationLimits.description: Grants permission to get the communication limits configuration of an Amazon Connect instance

GetInstanceOnboardingJobStatus.description: Grants permission to get onboarding job status for an Amazon Connect instance

ListCampaigns.description: Grants permission to provide summary of all campaigns

ListConnectInstanceIntegrations.description: Grants permission to provide summary of all integrations with an Amazon Connect instance

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PauseCampaign.description: Grants permission to pause a campaign

PutConnectInstanceIntegration.description: Grants permission to put an integration configuration with an Amazon Connect instance

PutDialRequestBatch.description: Grants permission to create dial requests for the specified campaign

PutInstanceCommunicationLimits.description: Grants permission to put the communication limits configuration of an Amazon Connect instance

PutOutboundRequestBatch.description: Grants permission to create dial requests for the specified campaign

PutProfileOutboundRequestBatch.description: Grants permission to create profile outbound requests for the specified campaign

ResumeCampaign.description: Grants permission to resume a campaign

StartCampaign.description: Grants permission to start a campaign

StartInstanceOnboardingJob.description: Grants permission to start onboarding job for an Amazon Connect instance

StopCampaign.description: Grants permission to stop a campaign

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateCampaignChannelSubtypeConfig.description: Grants permission to update the channel subtype configuration of a campaign

UpdateCampaignCommunicationLimits.description: Grants permission to update the communication limits configuration of a campaign

UpdateCampaignCommunicationTime.description: Grants permission to update the communication time configuration of a campaign

UpdateCampaignDialerConfig.description: Grants permission to update the dialer configuration of a campaign

UpdateCampaignFlowAssociation.description: Grants permission to update the flow association of a campaign

UpdateCampaignName.description: Grants permission to update the name of a campaign

UpdateCampaignOutboundCallConfig.description: Grants permission to update the outbound call configuration of a campaign

UpdateCampaignSchedule.description: Grants permission to update the schedule of a campaign

UpdateCampaignSource.description: Grants permission to update the source of a campaign

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by actions based on the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by actions based on tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by actions based on the presence of tag keys in the request
